title: **Balance Sheet Overview – As of December 31, 2026**
content:
Total assets rose to $10,493 million, up 1.6%, reflecting continued balance-sheet expansion.

Cash and deposits climbed to $81,700 thousand, up 12.9% from the prior quarter, while investment securities grew to $2,204 million, up 2.7%. Loans and leases increased to $6,630 million, up 0.2%, whereas other assets fell to $83,700 thousand, down 0.7%.

The asset mix remains loan-centric at 63.2% of total assets, supporting the credit union’s core lending function.

Total liabilities increased to $8,505 million, up 1.3%, driven primarily by shares and deposits at $8,455 thousand, up 1.2%. Accrued liabilities declined modestly at -22.9% from the prior quarter, while other liabilities held flat.

Total equity grew to $878 million, up 1.8%, supported by undivided earnings of $93,400 thousand and stable reserves, reflecting continued capital strength.
